/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/lru.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/ttl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/wal.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/server.cpp.o" -o kv-server  -lpthread
